recommendations.title: Alucarda
recommendations.overview: A young girl's arrival at a convent after the death of her parents marks the beginning of a series of events that unleash an evil presence on the girl and her mysterious new friend, an enigmatic figure known as Alucarda. Demonic possession, Satan wor

recommendations.title: The Getaway
recommendations.overview: A recently released ex-convict and his loyal wife go on the run after a heist goes wrong.

recommendations.title: The Wild Bunch
recommendations.overview: An aging group of outlaws look for one last big score as the "traditional" American West is disappearing around them.

recommendations.title: Brightburn
recommendations.overview: What if a child from another world crash-landed on Earth, but instead of becoming a hero to mankind, he proved to be something far more sinister?

recommendations.title: Pat Garrett & Billy the Kid
recommendations.overview: Pat Garrett is hired as a lawman on behalf of a group of wealthy New Mexico cattle barons to bring down his old friend Billy the Kid.

recommendations.title: Bring Me the Head of Alfredo Garcia
recommendations.overview: An American bartender and his prostitute girlfriend go on a road trip through the Mexican underworld to collect a $1 million bounty on the head of a dead gigolo.

recommendations.title: Invaders from Mars
recommendations.overview: A boy tries to stop aliens that have taken over his town and are brainwashing its inhabitants.

recommendations.title: Occupation: Rainfall
recommendations.overview: Two years into an intergalactic invasion of Earth, survivors in Sydney, Australia, fight back in a desperate ground war. As casualties mount by the day, the resistance and their unexpected allies, uncover a plot that could see the war come to a decis

recommendations.title: Phantoms
recommendations.overview: In the peaceful Colorado town of Snowfield, something evil has wiped out the community. And now, it's up to a group of people to stop it, or at least get out of Snowfield alive.

recommendations.title: The Osterman Weekend
recommendations.overview: The host of an investigative news show is convinced by the CIA that the friends he has invited to a weekend in the country are engaged in a conspiracy that threatens national security.
